calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-03-2021 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-11-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brian Connors, via ZOOM, counsel for Ronald Epley, also via ZOOM, Petitioner.

At the outset, counsel is advised that the court's main issue with this matter is the failure to insure accounts which exceed the limits covered by the FDIC. Counsel reports that he is aware of the issue regarding the uninsured funds and apologizes to the court for the oversight. After the court advises counsel to take note of this issue regarding uninsured funds moving forward, the Accounting Petition is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-20-2021 Continued To May-05-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-03-2020 Granted Per Written Order
